name_en: In Stock Chane🎶Vintage Double C Backpack Cowhide Ball Print
name_cn:
In Stock Chane🎶Vintage Double C Backpack Cowhide Ball Print
The highlight of this bag is its large double C logo, rare, niche and special ❤️
No need to worry about matching bags, the design is simple and elegant, the cowhide pebbled texture is very durable. Huge capacity, built-in small pocket is thoughtful, and the weight is nice too. Dimensions Length 31 Width 11 Height 34
A2213
